# openapi-spec Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [ApiContract Domain — openapi-spec Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/domain-apicontract.html): Defines the public interfaces and data schemas for the Supermodel ecosystem using OpenAPI specifications. Architectural overview of the ApiContract domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [BuildManifest Domain — openapi-spec Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/domain-buildmanifest.html): Handles the packaging and distribution configuration for the specification as an npm dependency. Architectural overview of the BuildManifest domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [package.json — openapi-spec Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/openapi-spec/file-package-json.html): Architecture documentation for package.json, a json file in the openapi-spec codebase.
